'''Queyta''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Danjar sector/Legends|Danjar sector]].

==History==
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Separatist Queyta base|base]] was located on Queyta.

Four [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] ([[Nico Diath]], [[Fay]], [[Jon Antilles]], and [[Knol Ven'nari]]) visited the base and were [[Death/Legends|killed]] there by [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] and [[Durge/Legends|Durge]], with [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] being the sole survivor.

Their sacrifice allowed Obi-Wan Kenobi to obtain the antidote to [[Jenna Zan Arbor]]'s [[swamp gas]].

{{Planet-stub}}
